/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/common.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/elf_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/elf_splitter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/segment_handler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/offset_calculator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/stub_generator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/elf-splitter.dir/src/stub_injector.cpp.o" -o elf-splitter
